_publications._publicationTitle: A randomized controlled trial of remote microphone listening devices to treat auditory deficits in children with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: reported improved listening/communication abilities in the school classroom (mean difference: 23.4%;  p  = 0.017)
details: Participants reported improved listening/communication abilities in school classroom with mean difference of 23.4% (p = 0.017)
